notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza singles on a line drive to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. Adam Frazier scores. Jorge Soler to 3rd. Jo Adell to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, third baseman Oswald Peraza to second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Juan Soto out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: MJ Melendez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: MJ Melendez grounds out, first baseman Nolan Schanuel to pitcher Ryan Zeferjahn.

notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, third baseman Oswald Peraza to second baseman Vaughn Grissom to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. MJ Melendez to 3rd. Brett Baty out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Juan Soto steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza singles on a line drive to center fielder Tyrone Taylor. Adam Frazier scores. Jorge Soler to 3rd. Jo Adell to 2nd.
